site.title: Zhouxing Zhao | Personal Homepage
site.description: A searchable personal homepage for public profile, projects, publications, services, and materials.

profile.name: Zhouxing Zhao
profile.headline: R&D Director | Chief Architect | AI, Data & Cloud-Edge Systems
profile.summary: Zhouxing Zhao works on AI engineering, data governance, low-altitude UAV applications, cloud-edge collaboration, and intelligent scheduling systems. His work connects enterprise architecture, research-driven product development, and large-scale engineering delivery across digital transformation scenarios.

highlights.text: Recommended as a candidate for China Telecom Association for Science and Technology's Most Beautiful Science and Technology Worker.
Led and participated in key projects on professional UAV R&D, data-driven code assembly, cloud-edge intelligent cores, and enterprise data governance.
Team achievements include recognition for Zhejiang Multimodal Intelligent IoT Communication Technology Key Enterprise Research Institute and Zhejiang Comservice advanced team.
Recognized as Excellent Architect by Zhejiang Smart City Promotion Association.

experience.organization: China Communications Services / Zhejiang Communications Services
bullets: Leads AI and data product R&D, digital transformation architecture, and cross-provincial delivery.
Built an AI capability platform and a 50-person AI R&D team with engineering standards and documentation practices.
Designed low-code, data asset, and reusable component architectures to reduce integration complexity.

experience.organization: Hangzhou Shuopan Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd.
bullets: Managed a 40-person R&D team and built master-data and foundational-data systems with TOGAF enterprise architecture methods.
Used data fabric and application assembly practices to shorten enterprise product delivery cycles.
Built DevOps and continuous integration systems from the ground up.
Led B2B DevOps platform construction from zero to one and reduced application release time significantly.
Designed KMS architecture for large-scale attachment data and intelligent permission management.
Managed software product BOM systems and received Hikvision's Golden Brick Award for two consecutive years.

education.details: Research focus: automatic control theory and applications.

projects.title: Professional UAV R&D and Applications for Typical Low-Altitude Scenarios
projects.summary: Developed a professional UAV platform for urban security, emergency communications, perception scheduling, intelligent recognition, and task collaboration in low-altitude scenarios.
projects.outcome: Built a unified scheduling platform for heterogeneous UAVs and improved real-time response capabilities in complex environments.

projects.title: Data-Driven Code Assembly Platform
projects.summary: Led an automated code assembly platform based on data-driven reuse, component reuse, modular repositories, and knowledge graphs.
projects.outcome: The platform improved average R&D efficiency by more than 30% according to the personal statement.

projects.title: Cloud-Edge Intelligent Core for Integrated Sensing and Collaborative Dispatching
projects.summary: Designed cloud-edge intelligent core architecture and lightweight AI inference technologies for constrained terminals, reducing AI processing latency and bandwidth usage in pilot applications.

projects.title: Key Technologies for Photovoltaic Cloud-Edge-Device Collaborative Intelligent Response
projects.summary: Researched cloud-edge-device collaboration for photovoltaic scenarios, including edge real-time monitoring, cloud scheduling, terminal response, and predictive maintenance.
projects.outcome: The personal statement records reported sales revenue of RMB 1 billion from this achievement.

documents.title: Professional Experience
documents.summary: Work experience spanning China Communications Services, Hangzhou Shuopan Intelligent Technology, and Hikvision.
documents.text: Professional Experience China Communications Services / Zhejiang Communications Services R&D Director and Chief Architect, May 2023 to present. Zhouxing Zhao leads AI and data product R&D, digital transformation architecture, and cross-provincial delivery. He built an AI capability platform, organized a 50-person AI R&D team, and promoted engineering standards, reusable components, and technical documentation systems. Hangzhou Shuopan Intelligent Technology Head of R&D Center, April 2021 to May 2023. He managed a 40-person R&D team, built master-data and foundational-data systems with TOGAF enterprise architecture methods, and used data fabric and application assembly practices to shorten enterprise software delivery cycles. Hikvision Digital Technology Senior Manager, July 2015 to April 2021. He led the construction of a B2B DevOps platform, designed large-scale KMS architecture for attachment data and intelligent permission management, managed software product BOM systems, and received Hikvision's Golden Brick Award for two consecutive years.

documents.title: Zhouxing Zhao - Public Profile Overview
documents.summary: A public English overview of Zhouxing Zhao's background, research interests, and professional profile.
documents.text: Zhouxing Zhao - Public Profile Overview Zhouxing Zhao is an R&D Director and Chief Architect based in Hangzhou, China. His work focuses on AI engineering, data governance, low-altitude UAV applications, cloud-edge collaboration, heterogeneous computing, and intelligent scheduling systems. He currently works at Zhejiang Communications Services Co., Ltd. His public profile combines enterprise architecture, engineering management, research-oriented product development, and digital transformation delivery. Research and engineering interests include computer vision, large model applications, data governance, cloud-edge-device collaboration, low-altitude economy scenarios, UAV scheduling, DevOps platforms, knowledge graphs, and heterogeneous computing resource scheduling.

documents.title: Representative Research and Engineering Projects
documents.summary: Detailed project achievements in low-altitude UAV systems, data-driven code assembly, cloud-edge intelligent cores, and photovoltaic cloud-edge-device collaboration.
documents.text: Representative Research and Engineering Projects Professional UAV R&D and Applications for Typical Low-Altitude Scenarios Period: 2025 to 2026. Role: Core contributor, rank 4/30. Achievement: Developed a professional UAV platform for urban security, emergency communications, perception scheduling, intelligent recognition, and task collaboration. Built a unified scheduling platform for heterogeneous UAVs, supporting collaborative operation across different aircraft types. Technical focus: target detection, behavior recognition, intelligent scheduling algorithms, multi-mode navigation, anti-interference control, and real-time response in complex low-altitude environments. Data-Driven Code Assembly Platform Period: 2023 to 2025. Role: Project lead, rank 1/40. Achievement: Led an automated code assembly platform based on data-driven reuse, component reuse, modular code repositories, and knowledge graphs. The platform supports rapid component matching and intelligent assembly. Reported outcome: the platform improved average R&D efficiency by more than 30% according to the personal statement. Cloud-Edge Intelligent Core for Integrated Sensing and Collaborative Dispatching Period: 2025 to 2026. Role: Architecture lead. Achievement: Designed cloud-edge intelligent core architecture and lightweight AI inference technologies for constrained terminals. Technical focus: low-latency AI inference, cloud-edge-device collaboration, heterogeneous computing scheduling, and integrated sensing and dispatching. Key Technologies for Photovoltaic Cloud-Edge-Device Collaborative Intelligent Response Period: 2024 to 2025. Role: Project lead. Achievement: Researched cloud-edge-device collaboration in photovoltaic scenarios, including edge-side real-time monitoring, cloud-side intelligent scheduling, terminal response, and predictive maintenance models. Reported outcome: the personal statement records reported sales revenue of RMB 1 billion from this achievement.
